Module com.example.escriturarapida
Package com.example.escriturarapida.controller

Class GameController

java.lang.Object
com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
public class GameController extends Object
Controller for the main game view. . This class manages user interaction, game logic, and UI updates. It handles word validation, level progression, time control, and transitions between different game states. . Responsibilities: - Shows words to the player - Validate user input - Manage levels and score - Control countdown timer - Handle game over conditions
Version:
1.0

  • Field Details

    • message

      public String message
      Final message displayed when the game ends.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameController

      public GameController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller after the FXML is loaded. This method sets up the game state, initializes models, displays the first word, starts the timer, and configures button actions.

    • startTimer

      public void startTimer()
      This method starts the countdown timer. . The timer decreases every second and updates the UI. When time is low, the label turns red. If time runs out, it automatically triggers validation.

    • resetTimer

      public void resetTimer()
      This method resets the timer based on the current level difficulty and restores the original color of time. The available time may decrease as the player progresses.

    • transitionValidateWord

      public void transitionValidateWord()
      This Method shows temporary feedback after validation. Shows a message (correct/incorrect) for a short duration and then hides it automatically.

    • onHandleEnter

      public void onHandleEnter(javafx.event.ActionEvent event)
      Triggered when the user presses ENTER in the text field. This method simulates a button click for validation.
      Parameters:
      event - the action event triggered by pressing ENTER

    • onHandleValidate

      public void onHandleValidate(javafx.event.ActionEvent event) throws IOException
      This method handles the validation of the typed word. If the word is correct: - Displays success feedback - Increases level and score - Resets timer - Generates a new word If the word is incorrect: - Displays error feedback - Stops the timer - Ends the game
      Parameters:
      event - the action event triggered by the button
      Throws:
      IOException - if scene transition fails

    • finishGame

      public void finishGame()
      This Method ends the game and transitions to the results screen. Sends the final score and message to the controller results.

    • onHandleReset

      public void onHandleReset(javafx.event.ActionEvent event) throws IOException
      This method handles the reset action triggered by the user. . Resets game state, clears input, and returns to the main menu.
      Parameters:
      event - the action event triggered by the reset button
      Throws:
      IOException - if scene transition fails
